positive: Stylized vector illustration of a cosmic forest scene, featuring large, bioluminescent flora and whimsical, gentle alien creatures. The composition is centered, showcasing a central archway formed by oversized, root-like plants. Use a deep indigo, vibrant teal, and glowing neon magenta color palette, contrasted by clean blacks and whites. The style should be flat vector art with strong, defined outlines, evoking a modern tapestry or apparel print aesthetic. Highly detailed, symmetrical composition, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
